swahili.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Hakuna tukio kubwa. Kazi ya nyanjani ya kawaida, maendeleo thabiti.
swahili.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Eneo la maji linapona pande zote. Vyanzo vya maji ni baridi na safi. Mkondo mkuu unabeba samaki tena. Ardhioevu za beaver zinafanya kazi ya tambarare ya mafuriko. Hivi ndivyo uponaji wa kiwango cha eneo la maji unavyoonekana wakati wakati na jamii vinapokutana.
swahili.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Vipengele vingi vinaboreka. Vichache bado vinahitaji kazi. Mwelekeo ni mzuri na jamii imejihusisha.
swahili.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Mafanikio kadhaa, mapengo kadhaa. Kazi halisi ya eneo la maji mara chache ni sawa; baadhi ya sehemu ziliboreka huku nyingine zikisimama.
swahili.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Ubora wa wastani ni mdogo na vipengele vichache vilifikia vizingiti vya uponaji. Hivi ndivyo maeneo ya maji yanavyoharibika kimyakimya wakati usimamizi hauwezi kuendana na shinikizo.
swahili.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Hali za awali zinaonekana zinazowezekana. Tumia Mwaka 1 kwa ufuatiliaji wa sayansi ya raia na elimu, kujenga uungwaji mkono wa jamii kabla ya kuutumia kwa vitendo vyenye mzozo kama uondoaji wa mabwawa.
swahili.watershed_deep_dive: Uchambuzi wa kina wa eneo la maji
swahili.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Ubora wa kipengele katika kampeni ya miaka 10
swahili.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Chati ya mwelekeo wa ubora mwaka kwa mwaka kwa kipengele cha eneo la maji
swahili.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Mwalimu wa eneo la maji wa AI anasoma data yako ya eneo la maji...
swahili.ai_watershed_reading: Usomaji wa eneo la maji wa AI
swahili.ai_watershed_reading_2: Usomaji wa eneo la maji wa AI
swahili.ai_watershed_science_educator: Mwalimu wa sayansi ya eneo la maji wa AI.
swahili.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Si mtu wa Wabanaki, si mratibu halisi wa eneo la maji au mtaalamu wa haidrolojia, na hazungumzi kwa niaba ya taifa, shirika au taasisi yoyote ya Wabanaki.
swahili.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Kwa sauti zenye mamlaka kuhusu kazi ya maeneo ya maji ya Maine, shauriana na Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, na Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
swahili.watershed_steward_maine_campaign: 💧 Mlinzi wa Eneo la Maji: kampeni ya Maine
swahili.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Mlinzi wa Eneo la Maji: kampeni ya Maine ya miaka 10
swahili.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Vipengele sita vya eneo la maji, miaka kumi, shinikizo halisi za Maine: vizuizi vya mabwawa, mtiririko wa kilimo, maji ya mvua ya vitongoji, mafuriko na ukame unaosababishwa na hali ya hewa.
swahili.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Sheria za mrejesho wa haidrolojia zinaviunganisha.
swahili.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Kanda za buffer zenye afya hupoza vijito vya vyanzo. Ardhioevu za beaver hupunguza mafuriko na kusafisha mkondo mkuu. Mtiririko mdogo wa kilimo huiacha mto upumue. Mito iliyounganishwa, yenye kivuli hurudisha uhamiaji wa salmoni na alewife.
swahili.watershed_deep_dive_2: 📚 Uchambuzi wa kina wa eneo la maji →
swahili.begin_10_year_watershed_campaign: 💧 Anza kampeni ya eneo la maji ya miaka 10
swahili.watershed_steward_debrief: 💧 Mlinzi wa Eneo la Maji: Tathmini
swahili.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Je, ungekuwa hujafanya chochote kwa miaka 10?
swahili.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Sheria za mrejesho wa haidrolojia mwaka huu
swahili.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Muombe mwalimu wa eneo la maji wa AI asome data yako ya eneo la maji
swahili.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Mwalimu wa sayansi ya eneo la maji wa AI anasoma hali yako ya sasa
swahili.watershed_deep_dive_3: Uchambuzi wa kina wa eneo la maji
swahili.watershed_wide_actions: 🛠 Vitendo vya eneo zima la maji
swahili.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Bado hakuna vitendo mwaka huu. Chagua kipengele, chagua mbinu.
swahili.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Ufupishaji hautoshi — joto kupita kiasi au ukavu kupita kiasi.
swahili.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Ufupishaji wa polepole. Mvua thabiti lakini ya upole.
swahili.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Unyevu wa juu + joto baridi + kupaa kwa nguvu → mvua kali ya mkondoupaa.
swahili.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Rekebisha unyevu wa wingu, joto na upepo. Wijeti huainisha mvua katika mojawapo ya aina nne tofauti. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — telezesha na tazama.
swahili.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Dhana (maandishi huru): Nini husababisha dhoruba dhidi ya manyunyu?
swahili.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Shikilia vitelezi viwili thabiti. Sogeza kimoja. Tazama.
swahili.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Pata mipangilio miwili inayozalisha aina ileile.
swahili.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Dhoruba halisi zinahitaji unyevu na ukosefu wa utulivu. Chunguza.
swahili.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Naelewa — eleza kwa maneno yako mwenyewe
swahili.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Eleza jinsi unyevu, joto na upepo vinavyoamua pamoja aina ya mvua.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Dokezo la muundo: kialamisho cha mvua tofauti cha aina 4; hakuna alama ya kiwango cha mvua; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Mzunguko wa Maji. Njia za mkato za kibodi: 1 hadi 6 huchagua hatua, J hubadilisha hali ya Safari, R U P huchagua njia yako ya safari.
swahili.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Badilisha kwenda kampeni ya Mlinzi wa Eneo la Maji ya miaka 10
swahili.switch_to_precipitation_discovery_widg: Badilisha kwenda wijeti ya Ugunduzi wa mvua
swahili.start_journey_mode_shortcut_j: Anza hali ya Safari (njia ya mkato: J)
swahili.end_journey_mode_shortcut_j: Maliza hali ya Safari (njia ya mkato: J)
swahili.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: panda tone moja kutoka baharini kurudi baharini. Utaanza baharini, utavukiza, utaelea kwenye wingu, utaanguka kama mvua, kisha utachagua njia ardhini (mtiririko wa mto, upenyaji chini ya ardhi au kufyonzwa na mmea). Kila njia huchukua muda tofauti. Kamilisha mzunguko ili kurekodi safari; mizunguko 3 hufungua beji ya Safari.
swahili.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Ulipanda molekuli ileile ya maji njia yote — ilibadilisha umbo (kioevu → mvuke → kioevu) lakini haikuwahi kuumbwa au kuharibiwa. Kila tone unalokunywa limekuwa likizunguka kwa mabilioni ya miaka.
swahili.choose_river_runoff_path_shortcut_r: Chagua njia ya Mtiririko wa mto (njia ya mkato: R)
swahili.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Chagua njia ya Upenyaji chini ya ardhi (njia ya mkato: U)
swahili.choose_plant_absorption_path_shortcut_: Chagua njia ya Ufyonzaji wa mmea (njia ya mkato: P)
swahili.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Kuwa tone la maji na safiri kupitia mzunguko wote wa maji! Fanya chaguo katika kila hatua na jifunze sayansi nyuma ya kila mabadiliko.
swahili.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Muulize mwalimu wa haidrolojia wa AI
swahili.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Uliza swali (mf., Kwa nini mawingu yanaelea?)...
swahili.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Maji yanahifadhiwa — mtiririko + yanayopenya ≈ 100% ya mvua inayofikia ardhi. Hakuna kinachopotea; huchukua tu njia tofauti kurudi baharini.
swahili.start_water_cycle_quiz: Anza jaribio la mzunguko wa maji
swahili.generate_ai_quiz_question: Tengeneza swali la jaribio kwa AI

somali.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Dhacdo weyn ma jirto. Shaqo goob caadi ah, horumar joogto ah.
somali.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Aagga biyuhu wuxuu ka bogsanayaa dhinacyada oo dhan. Isha biyuhu way qaboobaan oo nadiif ah. Durdurka weyn ayaa mar kale kalluun sida. Dhul-qoyan beaver-ku waxay qabtaan shaqada bannaanka daadka. Sidan ayay u eg tahay soo kabashada heerka aagga biyaha marka wakhtiga iyo bulshadu midoobaan.
somali.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Qaybaha badankoodu way hagaagayaan. Dhowr ayaa weli u baahan shaqo. Jihada way fiican tahay, bulshaduna way ka qaybqaadanaysaa.
somali.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Qaar guul, qaar farqi. Shaqada dhabta ah ee aagga biyuhu naadir ayay u simataa; qaybo ayaa hagaagay halka kuwa kale ay istaageen.
somali.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Tayada celceliska ah way hooseysaa, dhowr qaybood ayaana gaaray heerarka soo kabashada. Sidan ayay aagagga biyuhu si aamusan u sii xumaadaan marka maaraynta aysan la socon karin cadaadiska.
somali.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Xaaladaha bilowga ah waxay u muuqdaan kuwo la samayn karo. Isticmaal Sannadka 1 kormeerka sayniska muwaadinka iyo waxbarashada, si aad u dhisto taageero bulsho ka hor inta aadan ku bixin ficillada muranka leh sida ka saarista biyo-xireennada.
somali.watershed_deep_dive: Falanqayn qoto dheer oo aagga biyaha
somali.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Tayada qaybta inta lagu jiro ololaha 10 sano
somali.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Jaantuska isbeddelka tayada sannad-sannad ee qayb aagga biyaha
somali.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Macallinka aagga biyaha ee AI wuxuu akhrinayaa xogtaada aagga biyaha...
somali.ai_watershed_science_educator: Macallinka sayniska aagga biyaha ee AI.
somali.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ma aha qof Wabanaki ah, ma aha isuduwe aag biyo dhab ah ama khabiir cilmiga biyaha, mana hadlo magaca umad, hay'ad ama urur Wabanaki ah.
somali.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Codad awood leh oo ku saabsan shaqada aagga biyaha ee Maine, la tasho Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, iyo Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
somali.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Ilaaliyaha Aagga Biyaha: olole Maine 10 sano
somali.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Lix qaybood oo aagga biyaha, toban sano, cadaadis dhab ah oo Maine: caqabadaha biyo-xireenka, biyo-qulqul beeraley, biyaha roobka magaalooyinka, daadad iyo abaaro cimilo keentay.
somali.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Xeerarka jawaab-celinta cilmiga biyaha way isku xirayaan.
somali.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Aagagga difaaca caafimaadka qabaa waxay qaboojiyaan durdurrada isha. Dhul-qoyan beaver waxay yaraystaan daadka oo nadiifiyaan durdurka weyn. Biyo-qulqul beeraley hooseeya wuxuu u oggolaadaa webiga inuu neefsado. Webiyada isku xiran, hooska leh waxay soo celiyaan socdaalka kalluunka salmon iyo alewife.
somali.watershed_deep_dive_2: 📚 Falanqayn qoto dheer oo aagga biyaha →
somali.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Maxaa dhici lahaa haddii aadan waxba qaban 10 sano?
somali.replay_same_conditions: 🔁 Dib u ciyaar xaaladaha isku mid ah
somali.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Weydii macallinka aagga biyaha ee AI inuu akhriyo xogtaada aagga biyaha
somali.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Macallinka sayniska aagga biyaha ee AI wuxuu akhriyaa xaaladaada hadda
somali.watershed_deep_dive_3: Falanqayn qoto dheer oo aagga biyaha
somali.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Wali ma jiraan ficillo sannadkan. Dooro qayb, dooro farsamo.
somali.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Uumi-isuruuris ku filan maaha — aad u kulul ama aad u qalalan.
somali.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Uumi-isuruuris gaabis ah. Roob joogto ah laakiin jilicsan.
somali.strong_condensation_typical_rainfall: Uumi-isuruuris xoog leh. Roob caadi ah.
somali.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Qoyaan sare + heerkul qabow + kor-u-qaad xoog leh → roob kuleyl-gudbin xoog leh.
somali.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Hagaaji qoyaanka daruurta, heerkulka iyo dabaysha. Qalabku wuxuu u kala saaraa roobka mid ka mid ah afar nooc oo kala duwan. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto — gee oo fiiri.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): Maxaa kiciya duufaan iyo tif-tif?
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba siibaha oo deggan. Dhaqaaji mid. Fiiri.
somali.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara nooc isku mid ah.
somali.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Duufaannada dhabta ah waxay u baahan yihiin qoyaan iyo degganaan-la'aan labadaba. Baadh.
somali.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Sharax sida qoyaanka, heerkulka iyo dabayshu ay wada go'aamiyaan nooca roobka.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad roob oo kala duwan oo 4 nooc; dhibco heerka roobka ma jiraan; daah-furid ma jirto — ula kac.
somali.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Wareegga Biyaha. Gaaban-jidadka kiiboodhka: 1 ilaa 6 dooro marxalad, J wuxuu beddelaa habka Safarka, R U P doortaan jidkaaga safarka.
somali.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: U beddel ololaha Ilaaliyaha Aagga Biyaha 10 sano
somali.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: fuul hal dhibic oo badda ka soo bilaabata ilaa badda. Waxaad ka bilaabi doontaa badda, uumi bixi, daruur ku dhex socod, roob u dhac, ka dibna jid dhulka ka dooro (qulqul webi, dhex-gal dhul-hoosaad ama dhir nuugid). Jid kastaa wuxuu qaataa waqti kala duwan. Dhammaystir wareegga si aad u diiwaangeliso safar; 3 wareeg waxay furaan bilad Safar.
somali.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Waxaad fuushay molecule-ka biyaha isku mid ah jidka oo dhan — qaab buu beddelay (dareere → uumi → dareere) laakiin waligii lama abuurin ama lama burburin. Dhibic kasta oo aad cabto waxay wareegaysay malaayiin sano.
somali.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Noqo dhibic biyo ah oo ku safar wareegga biyaha oo dhan! Samee doorashooyin marxalad kasta oo baro sayniska ka dambeeya isbeddel kasta.
somali.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Weydii macallinka cilmiga biyaha ee AI
somali.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Su'aal weydii (tusaale, Maxay daruuruhu u sabbeeyaan?)...
somali.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Biyaha waa la ilaaliyaa — qulqul + waxa nuugma ≈ 100% roobka dhulka gaadha. Waxba ma luma; kaliya waxay qaataan jidad kala duwan oo badda ku noqda.

hausa.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Babu wani babban abu. Aikin filin yau da kullum, ci gaba mai ɗorewa.
hausa.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Yankin ruwa yana warkewa a kowane gefe. Tushen ruwa suna da sanyi da tsabta. Babban rafi yana ɗauke da kifi kuma. Filayen jiƙe na beaver suna yin aikin filin ambaliya. Haka farfaɗowa a matakin yankin ruwa take a lokacin da lokaci da al'umma suka haɗu.
hausa.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Yawancin sassan suna inganta. Wasu suna buƙatar aiki tukuna. Hanyar tana da kyau kuma al'umma na shiga.
hausa.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Wasu nasarori, wasu giɓi. Ainihin aikin yankin ruwa ba kasafai yake daidaita ba; wasu sassa sun inganta yayin da wasu suka tsaya.
hausa.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Matsakaicin inganci yana ƙasa kuma 'yan sassa ne suka kai matakan farfaɗowa. Haka yankunan ruwa ke lalacewa cikin shiru lokacin da sarrafawa ba zai iya bin matsin lamba ba.
hausa.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Yanayin farko yana kama da mai yiwuwa. Yi amfani da Shekara 1 don sa ido na kimiyyar 'yan ƙasa da ilimi, don gina goyon bayan al'umma kafin kashe shi a kan ayyuka masu cece-kuce kamar cire madatsar ruwa.
hausa.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Abin da za ka iya yi ga wannan sashe
hausa.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Ingancin sashe a tsawon yaƙin neman shekaru 10
hausa.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Jadawalin yanayin inganci shekara-shekara bisa sashen yankin ruwa
hausa.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Malamin yankin ruwa na AI yana karanta bayanan yankin ruwanka...
hausa.ai_watershed_science_educator: Malamin kimiyyar yankin ruwa na AI.
hausa.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ba mutumin Wabanaki ba ne, ba ainihin mai daidaita yankin ruwa ko masanin ruwa ba, kuma ba ya magana a madadin kowace ƙasa, hukuma ko ƙungiyar Wabanaki ba.
hausa.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Don muryoyi masu iko game da aikin yankin ruwa na Maine, tuntuɓi Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, da Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
hausa.watershed_steward_maine_campaign: 💧 Mai Kula da Yankin Ruwa: yaƙin Maine
hausa.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Mai Kula da Yankin Ruwa: yaƙin Maine na shekaru 10
hausa.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Sassa shida na yankin ruwa, shekaru goma, ainihin matsin Maine: shingen madatsun ruwa, kwararar noma, ruwan sama na kewayen birni, ambaliya da fari sakamakon yanayi.
hausa.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Dokokin amsa kuwwa na ruwa suna haɗa su.
hausa.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Yankunan kariya masu lafiya suna sanyaya rafuffukan tushen ruwa. Filayen jiƙe na beaver suna rage ambaliya tare da tsaftace babban rafi. Ƙarancin kwararar noma yana barin kogi ya numfasa. Kogunan da aka haɗa, masu inuwa suna mayar da ƙaurar salmon da alewife.
hausa.begin_10_year_watershed_campaign: 💧 Fara yaƙin yankin ruwa na shekaru 10
hausa.watershed_steward_debrief: 💧 Mai Kula da Yankin Ruwa: Bayani
hausa.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Idan ba ka yi komai ba na shekaru 10 fa?
hausa.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Dokokin amsa kuwwa na ruwa na wannan shekara
hausa.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Nemi malamin yankin ruwa na AI ya karanta bayanan yankin ruwanka
hausa.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Malamin kimiyyar yankin ruwa na AI yana karanta halinka na yanzu
hausa.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Babu ayyuka tukuna wannan shekara. Zaɓi sashe, zaɓi dabara.
hausa.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Tarawar ruwa bai isa ba — mai zafi sosai ko bushe sosai.
hausa.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Tarawar ruwa a hankali. Ruwan sama mai ɗorewa amma mai laushi.
hausa.strong_condensation_typical_rainfall: Tarawar ruwa mai ƙarfi. Ruwan sama na yau da kullum.
hausa.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Yawan danshi + zafin sanyi + ɗagawa mai ƙarfi → ruwan sama mai ƙarfi na convective.
hausa.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Daidaita danshin girgije, zafi da iska. Na'urar tana rarraba ruwan sama zuwa ɗaya daga cikin nau'i huɗu daban-daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — share ka lura.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hasashe (rubutu na kyauta): Me ke haifar da hadari maimakon yayyafi?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Riƙe nunin gusawa biyu tsayayye. Motsa ɗaya. Lura.
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Nemo saitunan biyu da ke samar da nau'i iri ɗaya.
hausa.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Hadari na gaske suna buƙatar danshi da rashin kwanciyar hankali duka. Bincika.
hausa.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Bayyana yadda danshi, zafi da iska tare suke ƙayyade nau'in ruwan sama.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Bayanin ƙira: alamar ruwan sama daban ta nau'i 4; babu makin yawan ruwan sama; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Tsarin Ruwa. Gajerun hanyoyin madannai: 1 zuwa 6 suna zaɓar mataki, J yana sauya yanayin Tafiya, R U P suna zaɓar hanyar tafiyarka.
hausa.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Sauya zuwa yaƙin Mai Kula da Yankin Ruwa na shekaru 10
hausa.switch_to_precipitation_discovery_widg: Sauya zuwa na'urar Gano ruwan sama
hausa.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: hau ɗiga ɗaya daga teku zuwa teku. Za ka fara a teku, ka ƙafe, ka yi yawo cikin girgije, ka faɗo a matsayin ruwan sama, sannan ka zaɓi hanya a ƙasa (kwararar kogi, shiga ƙarƙashin ƙasa ko tsiro ya sha shi). Kowace hanya tana ɗaukar lokaci daban. Kammala madauki don rubuta tafiya; madauki 3 suna buɗe lambar Tafiya.
hausa.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Ka hau kwayar ruwa iri ɗaya duka hanyar — ta canza siffa (ruwa → tururi → ruwa) amma ba a taɓa ƙirƙirar ta ko lalata ta ba. Kowane ɗiga da ka sha yana zagayawa tsawon biliyoyin shekaru.
hausa.choose_river_runoff_path_shortcut_r: Zaɓi hanyar Kwararar kogi (gajeriyar hanya: R)
hausa.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Zaɓi hanyar Shiga ƙarƙashin ƙasa (gajeriyar hanya: U)
hausa.choose_plant_absorption_path_shortcut_: Zaɓi hanyar Shaƙar tsiro (gajeriyar hanya: P)
hausa.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Zama ɗigan ruwa ka yi tafiya cikin dukan tsarin ruwa! Yi zaɓuɓɓuka a kowane mataki ka koyi kimiyyar da ke bayan kowane sauyi.
hausa.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Tambayi malamin ilimin ruwa na AI
hausa.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Yi tambaya (misali, Me ya sa girgije ke shawagi?)...
hausa.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Ana adana ruwa — kwarara + abin da ke shiga ≈ 100% na ruwan sama da ya kai ƙasa. Babu abin da ke ɓacewa; kawai yana ɗaukar hanyoyi daban-daban komawa teku.
hausa.generate_ai_quiz_question: Samar da tambayar jarrabawa ta AI

yoruba.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Kò sí ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ ńlá. Iṣẹ́ pápá déédéé, ìtẹ̀síwájú dúró ṣinṣin.
yoruba.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Agbada omi ń mú láradá ní gbogbo ojú. Orísun omi tutù, ó sì mọ́. Ọ̀nà omi pàtàkì gbé ẹja padà. Ilẹ̀ tútù beaver ń ṣe iṣẹ́ pẹ̀tẹ́lẹ̀ ìkún omi. Báyìí ni ìmúláradá ní ìwọ̀n agbada omi ṣe rí nígbà tí àkókò àti àwùjọ bá pàdé.
yoruba.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Ọ̀pọ̀ àwọn ẹ̀yà ń sunwọ̀n sí i. Díẹ̀ ṣì nílò iṣẹ́. Ọ̀nà náà dára, àwùjọ sì kópa.
yoruba.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Àwọn ìṣẹ́gun kan, àwọn àlàfo kan. Iṣẹ́ agbada omi gidi kì í ṣe déédéé; àwọn apá kan sunwọ̀n nígbà tí àwọn mìíràn dúró.
yoruba.slipping_watershed: Agbada omi tó ń rẹ̀ sílẹ̀
yoruba.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Ìpíndọ́gba ìdára kéré, díẹ̀ àwọn ẹ̀yà ló dé ààlà ìmúláradá. Báyìí ni àwọn agbada omi ṣe ń bàjẹ́ ní ìdákẹ́jẹ́ẹ́ nígbà tí ìṣàkóso kò bá lè bá ìkìmọ́lẹ̀ mu.
yoruba.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Àwọn ipò ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ dàbí èyí tó ṣeé ṣe. Lo Ọdún 1 fún àbójútó sáyẹ́ǹsì aráalú àti ẹ̀kọ́, láti kọ́ àtìlẹ́yìn àwùjọ kí o tó ná an lórí àwọn iṣẹ́ àríyànjiyàn bíi yíyọ omi-dídá kúrò.
yoruba.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Ohun tí o lè ṣe fún ẹ̀yà yìí
yoruba.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Àwòrán ìtẹ̀sí ìdára ọdún-dé-ọdún nípa ẹ̀yà agbada omi
yoruba.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Olùkọ́ agbada omi AI ń ka dátà agbada omi rẹ...
yoruba.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Kì í ṣe ẹni Wabanaki, kì í ṣe alákòóso agbada omi gidi tàbí onímọ̀ omi, kì í sì í sọ̀rọ̀ ní orúkọ orílẹ̀-èdè, àjọ tàbí ètò Wabanaki kankan.
yoruba.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Fún àwọn ohùn aláṣẹ nípa iṣẹ́ agbada omi Maine, kan sí Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, àti Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
yoruba.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Olùṣọ́ Agbada Omi: ìpolongo Maine ọdún 10
yoruba.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Ẹ̀yà agbada omi mẹ́fà, ọdún mẹ́wàá, ìkìmọ́lẹ̀ gidi Maine: ìdènà omi-dídá, ìṣàn oko, omi òjò agbègbè ìlú, ìkún omi àti ọ̀dá tí ojú-ọjọ́ fà.
yoruba.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Àwọn òfin ìdáhùn omi so wọ́n pọ̀.
yoruba.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Àwọn agbègbè ààbò tó dára ń tu àwọn ọ̀nà omi orísun. Ilẹ̀ tútù beaver ń dín ìkún omi kù, ó sì ń wẹ ọ̀nà omi pàtàkì mọ́. Ìṣàn oko kékeré ń jẹ́ kí odò mí. Àwọn odò tí a sopọ̀, tí ó ní òjìji ń mú ìṣíkiri salmon àti alewife padà.
yoruba.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Kí ni ìbá ṣẹlẹ̀ tí o kò bá ṣe ohunkóhun fún ọdún 10?
yoruba.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Àwọn òfin ìdáhùn omi ọdún yìí
yoruba.what_changed_this_year: Ohun tó yípadà ní ọdún yìí
yoruba.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Béèrè lọ́wọ́ olùkọ́ agbada omi AI láti ka dátà agbada omi rẹ
yoruba.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Olùkọ́ sáyẹ́ǹsì agbada omi AI ka ipò rẹ lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́
yoruba.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Kò sí ìgbésẹ̀ síbẹ̀ ní ọdún yìí. Yan ẹ̀yà kan, yan ọgbọ́n kan.
yoruba.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Ìpọ̀jọ omi kò tó — gbígbóná jù tàbí gbígbẹ jù.
yoruba.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Ìpọ̀jọ omi lọ́ra. Òjò dúró ṣinṣin ṣùgbọ́n jẹ́jẹ́.
yoruba.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Ọ̀rinrin gíga + ìgbóná tútù + ìgbéga lágbára → òjò convective lágbára.
yoruba.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Ṣàtúnṣe ọ̀rinrin àwọsánmà, ìgbóná àti afẹ́fẹ́. Ẹ̀rọ náà ṣe ìpín òjò sí ọ̀kan nínú irú mẹ́rin ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀. Kò sí àmì, kò sí ìfihàn — fà kí o sì ṣàkíyèsí.
yoruba.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Àbá (ọ̀rọ̀ òmìnira): Kí ló ń fa ìjì lòdì sí ọ̀wààrà?
yoruba.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 O dí — fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Di àwọn ìfàsẹ́yìn méjì mú ṣinṣin. Gbé ọ̀kan. Ṣàkíyèsí.
yoruba.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Wá àwọn ètò méjì tó ń mú irú kannáà jáde.
yoruba.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Àwọn ìjì gidi nílò ọ̀rinrin àti àìdúróṣinṣin lápapọ̀. Ṣèwádìí.
yoruba.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mo ti yé — ṣàlàyé ní ọ̀rọ̀ ara rẹ
yoruba.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Ṣàlàyé bí ọ̀rinrin, ìgbóná àti afẹ́fẹ́ ṣe ń pinnu irú òjò lápapọ̀.
yoruba.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Àkọsílẹ̀ àpẹẹrẹ: àmì òjò ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ irú 4; kò sí àmì òṣùwọ̀n òjò; kò sí ìfihàn — láfọ̀ọ̀mọ̀.
yoruba.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Yíyípo Omi. Àwọn kúkúrú bọ́tìnì: 1 sí 6 yan ìpele, J ṣe àyípadà ipò Ìrìnàjò, R U P yan ọ̀nà ìrìnàjò rẹ.
yoruba.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Yípadà sí ìpolongo Olùṣọ́ Agbada Omi ọdún 10
yoruba.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: gun ẹyọ omi kan láti òkun padà sí òkun. Ìwọ yóò bẹ̀rẹ̀ nínú òkun, ìwọ yóò yọ́, ìwọ yóò lọ sínú àwọsánmà, ìwọ yóò já bí òjò, lẹ́yìn náà ìwọ yóò yan ọ̀nà ní ilẹ̀ (ìṣàn odò, ìwọ̀ inú ilẹ̀ tàbí gbígbà ọ̀gbìn). Ọ̀nà kọ̀ọ̀kan gba àkókò ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀. Parí ìyípo láti ṣàkọsílẹ̀ ìrìnàjò; ìyípo 3 ṣí àmì-ẹ̀yẹ Ìrìnàjò.
yoruba.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: O gun molecule omi kannáà ní gbogbo ọ̀nà — ó yí ìrísí padà (omi → òyì → omi) ṣùgbọ́n a kò dá a tàbí pa á run rí. Gbogbo ẹyọ omi tí o mu ti ń yíká fún ọ̀kẹ́ àìmọye ọdún.
yoruba.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Yan ọ̀nà Ìwọ̀ inú ilẹ̀ (kúkúrú: U)
yoruba.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Di ẹyọ omi kí o sì rìnrìn-àjò gba gbogbo yíyípo omi! Ṣe àwọn àṣàyàn ní ìpele kọ̀ọ̀kan kí o sì kọ́ sáyẹ́ǹsì tó wà lẹ́yìn ìyípadà kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Béèrè lọ́wọ́ olùkọ́ onímọ̀ omi AI
yoruba.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Béèrè ìbéèrè (àpẹẹrẹ, Kí nìdí tí àwọn àwọsánmà fi ń léfòó?)...
yoruba.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 A pa omi mọ́ — ìṣàn + ohun tó wọ inú ≈ 100% òjò tó dé ilẹ̀. Kò sí ohun tó ń parẹ́; ó kàn ń gba àwọn ọ̀nà ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ padà sí òkun.

igbo.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Ọ dịghị nnukwu ihe omume. Ọrụ ubi nke oge niile, ọganihu kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Mpaghara mmiri na-agbake n'akụkụ niile. Isi mmiri dị jụụ ma dị ọcha. Isi iyi na-ebughachi azụ̀. Ala mmiri beaver na-arụ ọrụ mbara mmiri. Otú a ka mgbake n'ọkwa mpaghara mmiri dị mgbe oge na obodo zukọtara.
igbo.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Ọtụtụ akụrụngwa na-aka mma. Ole na ole ka chọrọ ọrụ. Ụzọ dị mma ma obodo na-etinye aka.
igbo.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Ụfọdụ mmeri, ụfọdụ oghere. Ezigbo ọrụ mpaghara mmiri anaghị ahakarị otu; akụkụ ụfọdụ ka mma ebe ndị ọzọ kwụsịrị.
igbo.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Nkezi ogo dị ala ma ọ bụ naanị akụrụngwa ole na ole rutere ókè mgbake. Otú a ka mpaghara mmiri si emebi n'echeghị echiche mgbe njikwa enweghị ike iso nrụgide.
igbo.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Ọnọdụ mmalite yiri ihe enwere ike ime. Jiri Afọ 1 maka nlekota sayensị ụmụ amaala na agụmakwụkwọ, iji wuo nkwado obodo tupu iji ya mefuo ihe na omume esemokwu dị ka iwepụ mmiri mgbochi.
igbo.watershed_deep_dive: Nyocha miri emi nke mpaghara mmiri
igbo.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Ihe ị nwere ike ime maka akụrụngwa a
igbo.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Ogo akụrụngwa n'oge mgbasa ozi afọ 10
igbo.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Eserese omume ogo afọ na afọ site na akụrụngwa mpaghara mmiri
igbo.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Onye nkuzi mpaghara mmiri AI na-agụ data mpaghara mmiri gị...
igbo.ai_watershed_science_educator: Onye nkuzi sayensị mpaghara mmiri AI.
igbo.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ọ bụghị onye Wabanaki, ọ bụghị ezigbo onye nhazi mpaghara mmiri ma ọ bụ ọkà mmụta mmiri, ọ naghịkwa ekwuru ọnụ maka mba, ụlọ ọrụ ma ọ bụ nzukọ Wabanaki ọ bụla.
igbo.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Maka olu nwere ikike gbasara ọrụ mpaghara mmiri Maine, gakwuru Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, na Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
igbo.watershed_steward_maine_campaign: 💧 Onye Nlekọta Mpaghara Mmiri: mgbasa ozi Maine
igbo.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Onye Nlekọta Mpaghara Mmiri: mgbasa ozi Maine afọ 10
igbo.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Akụrụngwa mpaghara mmiri isii, afọ iri, nrụgide Maine ezigbo: ihe mgbochi mmiri, mmiri ọrụ ugbo, mmiri mmiri obodo nta, idei mmiri na ụkọ mmiri site na ihu igwe.
igbo.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Iwu nzaghachi mmiri na-ekekọ ha ọnụ.
igbo.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Mpaghara nchekwa ahụ ike na-eme ka iyi isi mmiri jụọ oyi. Ala mmiri beaver na-ebelata idei mmiri ma na-ehicha isi iyi. Mmiri ọrụ ugbo dị ala na-eme ka osimiri kuru ume. Osimiri ejikọtara, nke nwere ndò na-eweghachi mbugharị salmon na alewife.
igbo.watershed_deep_dive_2: 📚 Nyocha miri emi nke mpaghara mmiri →
igbo.begin_10_year_watershed_campaign: 💧 Malite mgbasa ozi mpaghara mmiri afọ 10
igbo.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Gịnị ga-eme ma ọ bụrụ na i meghị ihe ọ bụla afọ 10?
igbo.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Gwa onye nkuzi mpaghara mmiri AI ka ọ gụọ data mpaghara mmiri gị
igbo.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Onye nkuzi sayensị mpaghara mmiri AI na-agụ ọnọdụ gị ugbu a
igbo.watershed_deep_dive_3: Nyocha miri emi nke mpaghara mmiri
igbo.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Enwebeghị omume afọ a. Họrọ akụrụngwa, họrọ usoro.
igbo.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Mkpụkọ mmiri ezughị — okpomọkụ karịa ma ọ bụ akọrọ karịa.
igbo.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Mkpụkọ mmiri nwayọọ. Mmiri ozuzo kwụ ọtọ mana dị nwayọọ.
igbo.strong_condensation_typical_rainfall: Mkpụkọ mmiri siri ike. Mmiri ozuzo nkịtị.
igbo.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Mmiri dị elu + okpomọkụ jụrụ oyi + mbuli siri ike → mmiri ozuzo convective siri ike.
igbo.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Dozie mmiri igwe ojii, okpomọkụ na ifufe. Ngwa na-ekewa mmiri ozuzo n'ime otu n'ime ụdị anọ dị iche iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosi — fanye ma hụ.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Echiche (ederede efu): Gịnị na-akpata oké ifufe megide mmiri ozuzo?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Jide slider abụọ kwụ ọtọ. Megharịa otu. Hụ.
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta otu ụdị.
igbo.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Oké ifufe ezigbo chọrọ mmiri na enweghị nkwụsi ike abụọ. Nyochaa.
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke gị
igbo.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Kọwaa otú mmiri, okpomọkụ na ifufe si ekpebikọ ụdị mmiri ozuzo.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Ndetu imewe: akara mmiri ozuzo dị iche iche nke ụdị 4; enweghị akara ọnụego mmiri ozuzo; enweghị ngosi — n'ụzọ ezubere.
igbo.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Okirikiri Mmiri. Ụzọ mkpirisi keyboard: 1 ruo 6 na-ahọrọ usoro, J na-agbanwe ụdị Njem, R U P na-ahọrọ ụzọ njem gị.
igbo.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Gbanwee na mgbasa ozi Onye Nlekọta Mpaghara Mmiri afọ 10
igbo.switch_to_precipitation_discovery_widg: Gbanwee na ngwa Nchọpụta mmiri ozuzo
igbo.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: nọkwasị otu mmiri site n'oké osimiri laghachi n'oké osimiri. Ị ga-amalite n'oké osimiri, kpụọ, na-ese n'igwe ojii, daa dị ka mmiri ozuzo, mgbe ahụ họrọ ụzọ n'ala (mmiri osimiri, mbanye n'okpuru ala ma ọ bụ osisi na-amịnye). Ụzọ ọ bụla na-ewe oge dị iche. Mechaa loop iji depụta njem; loop 3 na-emeghe baajị Njem.
igbo.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Ị nọkwasịrị otu molecule mmiri ahụ ụzọ niile — ọ gbanwere ụdị (mmiri → uzuoku → mmiri) mana e kepụtaghị ya ma ọ bụ bibie ya. Mmiri ọ bụla ị na-aṅụ na-agba gburugburu ọtụtụ ijeri afọ.
igbo.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Họrọ ụzọ Mbanye n'okpuru ala (mkpirisi: U)
igbo.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Ghọọ otu mmiri wee mee njem gafee okirikiri mmiri dum! Mee nhọrọ n'usoro ọ bụla wee mụta sayensị dị n'azụ mgbanwe ọ bụla.
igbo.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Jụọ onye nkuzi ọkà mmụta mmiri AI
igbo.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Jụọ ajụjụ (dịka, Gịnị mere igwe ojii ji ese n'elu?)...
igbo.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 A na-echekwa mmiri — mmiri na-asọ + ihe na-amịnye ≈ 100% nke mmiri ozuzo ruru ala. Ọ dịghị ihe na-efu; ọ na-ewere naanị ụzọ dị iche iche laghachi n'oké osimiri.
